__comment: Copy to config.json (in the plugin data directory) and edit. Global plugin toggles.

memory.__comment: Persistent memory module. Disable to skip SQLite init.

search.__comment: Web search module. Provider order determines failover. Each provider may require its own API key in agent-config.json.

channels.__comment: Discord channel backend. Requires a filled-in bot.json (token + channel IDs). Disable if you do not use Discord.
